report_name: CISA Releases Multiple Advisories for Critical Vulnerabilities in Industrial Control Systems and Operational Technology

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-7786
vulnerabilities.description: The Jinan USR IOT PUSR USR-W610 device firmware contains non-configurable, hard-coded credentials for an administrator account. An attacker with access to the firmware file can extract these credentials, gain full administrative access, alter device configuration, monitor or disrupt serial communications, and potentially pivot into the operational network.

vulnerabilities.name: ABB EIBPORT V3 KNX Gateway Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: Multiple vulnerabilities in the ABB EIBPORT V3 KNX gateway, used for building automation, could allow an unauthenticated attacker to access sensitive information and modify device settings.

vulnerabilities.name: Schneider Electric EcoStruxure Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: Flaws in Schneider Electric EcoStruxure products, including Machine Expert HVAC, involving issues like cleartext data storage and insecure password change mechanisms.

vulnerabilities.name: KMW CCTV Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: Flaws in KMW CCTV security cameras involving issues like cleartext data storage and insecure password change mechanisms.

vulnerabilities.name: CP Plus Product Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: Flaws in CP Plus products involving issues like cleartext data storage and insecure password change mechanisms.

vulnerabilities.name: Fourth Frontier Medical Device Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: Flaws in Fourth Frontier medical devices involving issues like cleartext data storage and insecure password change mechanisms.

indicators.name: Jinan USR-W610 Vulnerable Firmware File Detection
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Jinan USR-W610 Vulnerable Firmware File Presence
id: f1a2b3c4-d5e6-4789-a0b1-c2d3e4f5a6b7
status: experimental
description: Detects the presence of a specific firmware file for the Jinan USR-W610 device, which is known to contain hard-coded credentials (CVE-2026-7786). Its presence on file shares or endpoints may indicate analysis or preparation for updates on vulnerable systems.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/ics-advisories/icsa-26-149-01
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-29
tags:
  - attack.t1592
level: low
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '\USR-W610_V7.03T.07.bin'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate storage of the firmware by engineers for patching or analysis.
indicators.description: Detects the presence of the firmware file for the Jinan USR-W610, which is known to contain hard-coded credentials as per CVE-2026-7786.

indicators.name: Anomalous Unauthenticated ABB EIBPORT CGI Access
indicators.pattern:
title: Unauthenticated ABB EIBPORT CGI Access Attempt
id: 1234abcd-efab-4def-8abc-1234567890ab
status: experimental
description: Monitors for web requests to CGI scripts on ABB EIBPORT gateways, which could indicate exploitation attempts against known vulnerabilities.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/ics-advisories/icsa-26-149-02
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-29
tags:
  - attack.t0819
level: medium
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|contains: '/cgi-bin/'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate administrative access to the device's web interface.
indicators.description: Detects unusual or unauthenticated requests to CGI scripts on ABB EIBPORT gateways, which could indicate exploitation attempts.

relationships.source_name: Jinan USR-W610 Vulnerable Firmware File Detection
